_dataset: US Small-Business Books-Health Benchmarks by Industry
_owner: TechBrot Inc. — Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor team
_methodology: One anonymized row is logged at the close of an engagement, capturing the books-health profile of the business by industry and state. No client-identifying data is ever stored. Every value is observed on a real, completed engagement — never estimated or modeled. The published page reports the live N and never reports a statistic on a cell with N<20 for that breakdown.

_schema.engagement_id: string — anonymous opaque id, no client linkage
_schema.months_behind_at_intake: integer — months since last reconciled close at intake
_schema.books_health_band: string — one of: clean, minor-drift, behind, severe (observed at intake)
_schema.most_common_issue: string — the dominant issue found (e.g. unreconciled-accounts, miscategorized, undeposited-funds, sales-tax, payroll-liability, inventory)
_schema.monthly_fee_band: string — the closing recurring fee band: <400, 400-800, 800-1500, 1500-2500, 2500+
